sentences.korean: 저는 매일 아침 일곱 시에 일어납니다.
sentences.romanization: Jeoneun maeil achim ilgop sie ireonamnida.
sentences.translation: I wake up at seven o'clock every morning.
First, I wash my face and brush my teeth.
Then I eat breakfast.
I usually eat rice and kimchi.
I leave home at eight o'clock.
I take the subway to go to work.
It takes thirty minutes to get to work.
Today I went to a café with my friend.
I ordered an Americano.
My friend drank a café latte.
We also ate cake.
The café was very quiet.
We talked for two hours.
It was a really enjoyable time.

sentences.korean: 이번 주말에 여러 가지 계획이 있어요.
sentences.romanization: Ibeon jumale yeoreo gaji gyehoegi isseoyo.
sentences.translation: I have various plans for this weekend.
On Saturday morning, I have Korean class.

sentences.korean: 수업이 끝나면 친구들과 점심을 먹을 거예요.
sentences.romanization: Sueobi kkeunnamyeon chingudeulgwa jeomsimeul meogeul geoyeyo.
sentences.translation: After class, I will have lunch with my friends.
In the afternoon, I plan to go watch a movie.

sentences.korean: 일요일에는 집에서 쉬면서 책을 읽을 거예요.
sentences.romanization: Iryoire jibeseo swimyeonseo chaegeul ilgeul geoyeyo.
sentences.translation: On Sunday, I will rest at home and read a book.

sentences.korean: 저녁에는 가족과 함께 저녁 식사를 할 거예요.
sentences.romanization: Jeonyeogeneun gajokgwa hamkke jeonyeok siksareul hal geoyeyo.
sentences.translation: In the evening, I will have dinner with my family.

sentences.korean: 월요일이 되기 전에 충분히 휴식을 취하고 싶어요.
sentences.romanization: Woryoiri doegi jeone chungbunhi hyusigeul chwihago sipeoyo.
sentences.translation: I want to get enough rest before Monday comes.

sentences.korean: 오늘은 새 회사에서 첫 출근하는 날이에요.
sentences.romanization: Oneureun sae hoesaeseo cheot chulgeonhaneun narieyo.
sentences.translation: Today is my first day at the new company.
I woke up early and put on a suit.

sentences.korean: 긴장이 되어서 아침을 많이 못 먹었어요.
sentences.romanization: Ginjangi doeeoseo achimeul mani mot meogeosseoyo.
sentences.translation: I was nervous, so I couldn't eat much breakfast.
I arrived at the company and went to HR.
I introduced myself to the new colleagues.
Everyone kindly welcomed me.
Starting tomorrow, I will begin working in earnest.

sentences.korean: 지난 주에 처음으로 서울에 여행을 갔습니다.
sentences.romanization: Jinan jue cheoeumuro seoure yeohaengeul gassseumnida.
sentences.translation: Last week, I traveled to Seoul for the first time.

sentences.korean: 서울은 현대적인 건물과 전통적인 궁궐이 조화를 이루고 있습니다.
sentences.romanization: Seourun hyeondaejeogin geonmulgwa jeontongjeoin gunggwori johwareul irugo isseumnida.
sentences.translation: Seoul is a harmony of modern buildings and traditional palaces.

sentences.korean: 첫째 날에는 경복궁을 방문하여 한복을 입고 사진을 찍었습니다.
sentences.romanization: Cheotjjae nareneun gyeongbokgungeul bangmunhayeo hanbogeul ipgo sajineul jjigeossemnida.
sentences.translation: On the first day, I visited Gyeongbokgung Palace, wore hanbok, and took photos.

sentences.korean: 명동에서는 화장품과 기념품을 샀고 맛있는 길거리 음식을 먹었습니다.
sentences.romanization: Myeongdongeseoneun hwajangpumgwa ginyeompumeul satgo masinneun gilgeori eumsigeul meogeossemnida.
sentences.translation: In Myeongdong, I bought cosmetics and souvenirs and ate delicious street food.

sentences.korean: 남산타워에서 본 서울의 야경은 정말 아름다웠습니다.
sentences.romanization: Namsanthawoseo bon seoure yagyeongeun jeongmal areumdawossemnida.
sentences.translation: The night view of Seoul from Namsan Tower was really beautiful.

sentences.korean: 다음에는 더 오래 머물면서 다른 지역도 방문하고 싶습니다.
sentences.romanization: Daeumeneun deo orae meomulmyeonseo dareun jiyeokdo bangmunhago sipseumnida.
sentences.translation: Next time, I want to stay longer and visit other areas.

sentences.korean: 서울 여행은 제 인생에서 가장 기억에 남는 경험 중 하나입니다.
sentences.romanization: Seoul yeohaengeun je insaengeseo gajang gieoge namneun gyeongheom jung hanaimnida.
sentences.translation: The trip to Seoul is one of the most memorable experiences of my life.
